payload.label: table lamp
payload.long_description: Partial crop showing a cream/off-white fabric lampshade with a scalloped rim and decorative trim/fringe; cone-shaped shade sits above a small table-lamp base that is partly visible at the lower right, cut off by the image edge — appears close to the camera (≈0.6 m).
